repository_ssim: St. Catherine's Monastery of the Sinai
names_tesim: 軔軞軔 軔堞軙軡堋
軖軛堍軔堋 軖塥 軡軜軞堍堍
paracontent_tesim: This blessed book is endowed to the Church of the Lady, the Syrians, in the monastery of Mount Sinai. No one has authority from God the almighty to take it out from it in any way. Whoever takes it out from there and embezzled it to himself or others [鈥 may he be banned and separated from the glory of the Father, and may his share be with those who cried out: crucify him, Crucify him. [This statement] is from my mouth, I the despised among people, Jirm膩n奴s the servant of the Holy Mount of God in Sinai

full_text_tesim: This blessed book is endowed to the Church of the Lady, the Syrians, in the monastery of Mount Sinai. No one has authority from God the almighty to take it out from it in any way. Whoever takes it out from there and embezzled it to himself or others [鈥 may he be banned and separated from the glory of the Father, and may his share be with those who cried out: crucify him, Crucify him. [This statement] is from my mouth, I the despised among people, Jirm膩n奴s the servant of the Holy Mount of God in Sinai
